title: Hotec 12-Inch Stainless Steel Tongs, Multipurpose Tweezer Food Tongs Stainless Steel Steak Clip BBQ Long Tweezer Tongsg, Grilling and Baking, Cooking Tweezers Precision Serrated Tips, Set of 2
features: Food-safe stainless steel: The Hotec barbecue tongs are made of stainless steel, the ribbed grip surface and the matte surface ensure a non-slip grip. In addition, 30 cm corresponds to the optimal length for versatile applications.

Easy to use: a set of two stainless steel tweezers, straight tip tweezers are very stable, due to the straight tip design, they are easy to handle and are therefore also suitable for precise, delicate work, such as a chef decorative plate. Round tip tweezers are designed to flip larger items such as steaks, burgers/fish, grill, salad and more.

DISHWASHER SAFE: cooking tweezers sturdy, heat-resistant, rust-proof, corrosion-resistant, lightweight, easy to handle, like new forever. Due to the high-quality workmanship and the rust-proof stainless steel, the tweezers are dishwasher safe.

Safe design: the stainless steel tweezers are approx. 30 cm long, suitable as barbecue tweezers and barbecue tongs, because you can turn the grill and grill food at a safe distance without burning yourself, no risk of burning when grilling.

Multiple uses: the barbecue and cooking tweezers are versatile and we are mainly used for preparing steaks, chops, cutlets, sausages, fish, vegetables, fondue or grilled meat. All foods - whether meat, vegetables, salads or baked goods - hold firmly without slipping.
description: Product Description 100% food grade stainless steel kitchen Tweezers The sturdy brackets for the kitchen meet the highest standards, are rust-proof, heat-resistant, food-safe and easy to clean. Hotec food tweezers are indispensable for hobby and professional chefs. As barbecue or frying tweezers, but also for serving. Ideal for roasting, cooking and decorating. Food Grade and Sturdy Hotec tweezers tongs are made from high quality and food grade stainless steel, sturdy, heat resistance, anti-rust. Easy to clean, Dishwasher safe. Easy to Use The cooking tweezers' handle and tip are anti-slip. It allows you to grip any small object easily and accurately. ideal for decorating plates. Pointed and Round Tips Set of 2 kitchen tweezers are extra-long 12 inch. The head is perfectly symmetrical and has a serrated edge that allows them to grab food well. Widely Use Great for kitchen, restaurants, cooking, roasting, grabbing small objects, crafting, even for feeding small animals, cleaning out garden or fish tank.
